testcase.name: checkBirthDateTests

testcase.name: getBirthDateTests
testcase.system-out: Calling new PersonID( ) Reading the value of private String birthDate ~> "Not available" Verifying that "Not available" matches the expected pattern ""?Not\s+available[.!"]*" ✓ ----------------------------------------------------- Comparing the return value of the getter to the value of the attribute (ignoring the visibility modifier): ----------------------------------------------------- Reading the value of private String birthDate ~> "Not available" Checking whether getBirthDate( ) returns a String matching "Not available" ~> "Not available" (true) ✓ ----------------------------------------------------- Comparing the return value of the getter to the value of the attribute after setting a new value directly (ignoring the visibility modifier): ----------------------------------------------------- Assigning value "12.04.2040" to private String birthDate Checking whether getBirthDate( ) returns a String matching "12.04.2040" ~> "12.04.2040" (true) ✓

testcase.name: checkPersonIDNumberTests
testcase.system-out: Calling new PersonID( ) Checking whether checkPersonIDNumber( "061112-7833" ) returns true ~> true (true) ✓ Checking whether checkPersonIDNumber( "210121+190W" ) returns true ~> true (true) ✓ Checking whether checkPersonIDNumber( "250922A695F" ) returns true ~> true (true) ✓ Checking whether checkPersonIDNumber( "160364+1204r" ) returns false ~> false (true) ✓ Checking whether checkPersonIDNumber( "110681+867" ) returns false ~> false (true) ✓ Checking whether checkPersonIDNumber( "01220-784S" ) returns false ~> false (true) ✓ Checking whether checkPersonIDNumber( "110739(7898" ) returns false ~> false (true) ✓

testcase.name: setPersonIDTests
testcase.system-out:
Calling new PersonID( ) Calling setPersonID( "040899-7880" ) Verifying that "Ok" matches the expected pattern ""?Ok[.!"]*" ✓ Reading the value of private String birthDate ~> "04.08.1999" ✓ Calling setPersonID( "270490+359E" ) Verifying that "Ok" matches the expected pattern ""?Ok[.!"]*" ✓ Reading the value of private String birthDate ~> "27.04.1890" ✓ Calling setPersonID( "240402A532C" ) Verifying that "Ok" matches the expected pattern ""?Ok[.!"]*" ✓ Reading the value of private String birthDate ~> "24.04.2002" ✓
Verifying that calling setPersonId with null argument returns "Invalid birthday!", and that the birthDate is not changed: Reading the value of private String birthDate ~> "24.04.2002" Calling setPersonID( null ) Verifying that "Invalid birthday!" matches the expected pattern ""?Invalid\s+birthday[.!"]*" ✓ Reading the value of private String birthDate ~> "24.04.2002" ✓ OK
Calling setPersonID( "101192-601Eb" ) Verifying that "Invalid birthday!" matches the expected pattern ""?Invalid\s+birthday[.!"]*" ✓ Calling setPersonID( "141092+433" ) Verifying that "Invalid birthday!" matches the expected pattern ""?Invalid\s+birthday[.!"]*" ✓ Calling setPersonID( "100111F2217" ) Verifying that "Invalid birthday!" matches the expected pattern ""?Invalid\s+birthday[.!"]*" ✓ Calling setPersonID( "170252M575J" ) Verifying that "Invalid birthday!" matches the expected pattern ""?Invalid\s+birthday[.!"]*" ✓ Calling setPersonID( "041159[578A" ) Verifying that "Invalid birthday!" matches the expected pattern ""?Invalid\s+birthday[.!"]*" ✓ Calling setPersonID( "160233(431B" ) Verifying that "Invalid birthday!" matches the expected pattern ""?Invalid\s+birthday[.!"]*" ✓ Calling setPersonID( "200183+729G" ) Verifying that "Incorrect check mark!" matches the expected pattern ""?Incorrect\s+check\s*mark[.!"]*" ✓ Calling setPersonID( "281050+712C" ) Verifying that "Incorrect check mark!" matches the expected pattern ""?Incorrect\s+check\s*mark[.!"]*" ✓ Calling setPersonID( "xrubngrmqrk" ) Verifying that "Invalid birthday!" matches the expected pattern ""?Invalid\s+birthday[.!"]*" ✓
Invalid date: 00.02.2011 Calling setPersonID( "000211A314K" ) Return value: "Invalid birthday!" Verifying that "Invalid birthday!" matches the expected pattern ""?Invalid\s+birthday[.!"]*" ✓

testcase.name: checkLeapYearTests
testcase.system-out: Calling new PersonID( ) Testing leap years... ✓ Testing non-leap years... ✓
